User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the Asnap social media application, storing profile information and relationships with other users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

username.description: The unique display name chosen by the user.

username_lowercase.description: Lowercase version of the username for search purposes.

email.description: The user's email address, used for account recovery and notifications.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user for their profile.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user's profile was last updated.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents an ephemeral media post (image or video) shared by a user, designed to disappear after 48 hours.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who created the post.

mediaUrl.description: URL to the image or video content of the post.

caption.description: The text description accompanying the post.

hashtags.description: An array of hashtags associated with the post.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the post is scheduled to be automatically deleted.

likeCount.description: The total number of likes this post has received.

commentCount.description: The total number of comments this post has received.

viewCount.description: The total number of times the post has been viewed.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents a direct messaging conversation between users.

participants.description: Array of user IDs involved in the chat.

lastMessage.description: The text content of the last message sent.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the chat was last updated.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a single message within a chat.

firestore.reasoning: Standard Chat-Message structure with metadata at the chat root for efficient inbox listing.
